overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 through a rainy, neon-lit Night City. The vehicle navigates from downtown commercial streets through tunnels and elevated highways before descending into an industrial warehouse district, with consistent heavy rain and cyberpunk aesthetic throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk downtown commercial street with neon advertisements

events.description: vehicle approaches and crosses marked pedestrian crosswalk while following traffic

agents.ego_description: driving through rain-slicked city streets following a red sports car ahead

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving ahead, maintaining steady speed through intersections

entered.detail: tall commercial building covered in bright neon advertisements and digital screens
modern high-rise building with reflective glass windows and illuminated signage
white striped pedestrian crossing painted on wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: Driving through the neon-drenched commercial district of Night City during a heavy downpour. The windshield wipers move steadily as the vehicle follows a red sports car past illuminated billboards and glass skyscrapers, navigating through marked crosswalks on the rain-slicked asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban underpass and concrete tunnel system

events.description: vehicle enters covered tunnel from open city street, losing sky visibility
brief transition between tunnel sections with change in artificial lighting temperature

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through enclosed tunnel sections with artificial lighting

entered.detail: smooth grey concrete walls enclosing the roadway on both sides
diagonal hazard markings on tunnel entrance barriers
overhead fluorescent lighting fixtures illuminating the enclosed space

segments.scene_description: The vehicle transitions from the open neon city into a series of enclosed concrete tunnels. Artificial overhead lighting replaces the neon glow, and the concrete walls create a narrow, sheltered environment protected from the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with concrete barriers and electronic billboards

events.description: exiting tunnel onto elevated highway with open sky and reduced structures
navigating gradual curves on the elevated highway while maintaining speed

agents.ego_description: accelerating on elevated highway, navigating gentle curves with occasional vehicles passing

entered.detail: tall concrete safety barriers lining both sides of the elevated roadway
large illuminated advertisement billboard with cyan and pink neon graphics
directional signage mounted on gantry above the highway lanes
perforated metal fencing atop concrete barriers for sound dampening

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel onto an elevated highway exposed to the rainy sky. The vehicle speeds along the curved asphalt, passing illuminated billboards and concrete barriers while the cityscape spreads out in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial warehouse district with loading docks and security fencing

events.description: exiting highway via ramp and descending to street level industrial area
navigating through industrial intersection with traffic signals

agents.ego_description: descending exit ramp and navigating through industrial warehouse streets

notable_agents.action: yellow industrial truck driving ahead through the warehouse district

entered.detail: large utilitarian warehouse structure with loading bay doors and minimal windows
metal chain-link fencing surrounding industrial property lines
low industrial building with corrugated metal siding and flat roof

segments.scene_description: The vehicle descends from the elevated highway into a dimly lit industrial warehouse district. Surrounded by chain-link fences and corrugated metal buildings, the camera navigates through the utilitarian streets following a yellow truck, with fewer neon signs and more subdued lighting than the downtown area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive that transitions from the vibrant, neon-lit commercial heart of Night City into a bleak, industrial warehouse district. It begins amidst a heavy downpour in the city center, where windshield wipers clear the rain as the vehicle follows a red sports car past towering glass skyscrapers and glowing billboards. The scene then shifts from the open city into the sheltered confinement of concrete tunnels, where artificial overhead lights replace the neon glow of the streets. As the vehicle emerges from the tunnel, it accelerates along a curved elevated highway exposed to the rainy sky, with the sprawling cityscape receding into the distance. Finally, the camera descends from the highway into a dimly lit industrial zone, navigating past chain-link fences and corrugated metal buildings while following a yellow truck through subdued, utilitarian streets.
